scripts.build: npm ci --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web && rm -rf .next public && mkdir -p .next web/.next/standalone/.next && cp -R web/.next/standalone .next/standalone && cp -R web/.next/static .next/static && cp -R web/.next/static web/.next/standalone/.next/static && cp -R web/public public && cp -R web/public web/.next/standalone/public
